_deprecated: This file is no longer the source of truth for the RAG MCP client config. The backend's first-run installer (server/modules/first-run/rag-mcp-installer.ts) writes the real entry into ~/.claude.json under the `rag` name on the first backend boot, using findAppRoot() so paths resolve from wherever the project was cloned. Do not paste this file into ~/.claude.json — its hardcoded paths will break on a different clone location.
